testcase.name: canRefund is idempotent - checking twice returns same result
canRefund returns false for CREATED invoice
canRefund returns false when payerAddress is null
canRefund returns false for FAILED invoice
canRefund returns true for confirmed invoice with payer address
canRefund returns false for CANCELED invoice
canRefund returns true when actualMintUsed differs from expected
canRefund returns false for EXPIRED invoice
canRefund returns false for PENDING invoice
canRefund returns false when refundTxId already exists
canRefund returns true even with empty payerTokenAccount
